topic.description: The topic or title of the meeting.

hostId.description: The UID of the user who is hosting the meeting.

creatorName.description: The display name of the meeting creator.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the meeting was created.

status.description: The current status of the meeting.

JoinRequest.title: Join Request
JoinRequest.description: A request from a user to join a meeting.

userId.description: The UID of the user requesting to join.

userName.description: The display name of the user requesting to join.

userPhotoURL.description: The photo URL of the user.

status.description: The status of the join request.

requestedAt.description: The timestamp when the request was made.

meetingId.description: The ID of the meeting the user wants to join.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile data stored within a meeting's participants list.

name.description: The display name of the participant.

photoURL.description: The URL of the participant's avatar image.

joinedAt.description: The timestamp when the user joined the meeting.

ClassroomMessage.title: Classroom Message
ClassroomMessage.description: A message sent in a classroom chat.

/meetings/{meetingId}/joinRequests/{requ.description: Sub-collection for join requests for a specific meeting.

/meetings/{meetingId}/participants/{user.description: Sub-collection for participants in a specific meeting.

/classrooms/{classroomId}/joinRequests/{.description: Sub-collection for join requests for a specific meeting.

/classrooms/{classroomId}/participants/{.description: Sub-collection for participants in a specific meeting.

/classrooms/{classroomId}/messages/{mess.description: Collection of real-time chat messages for a classroom.
